parameters.content:
## Spotify Metadata Extractor (sub-workflow)

**After import:** open each HTTP Request node and select your **Spotify OAuth2** credential.

**Note:** Spotify removed batch `GET /v1/albums?ids=...` in Dev Mode (Feb 2026). This workflow fetches each album individually for P-line/copyright data.

**Test:** Execute workflow with `{ "artist_name": "Khruangbin" }`

**Connect to main workflow:** use **Call n8n Workflow Tool** and select this workflow. Pass `artist_name` from the agent.
